name: Modenaceti Veal Scaloppine
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and olive oil together in a frying pan.
2. Dredge the veal cutlets lightly in flour.
3. Fry over medium-high heat until the cutlets are lightly browned.
4. Slowly add balsamic vinegar, then chicken broth to the pan.
5. Allow the mixture to simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the gravy is thickened and the veal is fully cooked.
6. Serve with rice. You can use chicken breast or pork cutlets if you pound them enough.
(Note: From the Modenaceti label.)
